item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 22min “I hit 3-wood from I think it was 284 yards. The ball flight was probably around 30 feet
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 22min “I hit 3-wood from I think it was 284 yards. The ball flight was probably around 30 feet lower than I intended. And the line of the shot was probably around 15 yards left of where I intended. It was lucky, it really was.”
(R McIlroy, 2014) Cita PGA Championship @PGAChampionship · 16h From 280 to set up eagle. And to think they thought Rory McIlroy mishit it.
#PGAChamp 5 1 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 26min Masters recap took up most of @slicedpod this week. Possibly for the best that we had
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 26min Masters recap took up most of @slicedpod this week. Possibly for the best that we had to bin the TV segment due to time constraints. Watch below, listen wherever. youtube.com Another Masters for McIlroy, another near-miss for Rose; more Augusta... We're on hand to run through all the key talking pointers following another gripping renewal of the Masters, as Rory McIlroy defended his title, Scottie Sche... 4 1 mil

item.title: Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 28min He was also berating Calvert Lewin for not man marking Fernandes in injury time. Sound
item.description: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 28min He was also berating Calvert Lewin for not man marking Fernandes in injury time. Sounded like he wanted the Leeds win so him and Keane can stick the knife in Carrick during content this week Cita KevtheRed @angryfromMCR · 9h I think @GNev2 has burnt a few bridges with Utd fans tonight. 438

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 4h It makes sense that Rory the player would evolve along with Rory the person. But also I n
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 4h It makes sense that Rory the player would evolve along with Rory the person. But also I never saw it coming.
Newsletter today presented by @hbgolfusa . De normalsport.com 3 1 25 8 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 8h . @chambleebrandel made this point on Saturday night, and I want to re-emphas
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 8h . @chambleebrandel made this point on Saturday night, and I want to re-emphasize it after the fact. It was cool to see Rory fix his swing by himself on the range after a bad day. No coach, no Trackman, no training aids. Just the confidence that he knew his swing. 13 14 839 67 mil

Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 4h En respuesta a @KVanValkenburg y @chambleebrandel Idk why for pro golfers it’s kind of looked down upon having lots of coaches. A QB has HC, OC, QB coach, personal QB coach, trainer, physio, mental coach and more. Same for NBA. Yet golfers have more than one coach and it’s not as pure(?) or whatever it might be. 35 8 488 37 mil

Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 4h En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 y @chambleebrandel Football is almost never thought of or written about in romantic terms. It’s violence, it’s war, it’s tribal, is a test of masculinity. Golf is gets written about in artistic terms, man or woman alone with their thoughts and fears in the arena of nature. Fair or unfair, that’s Mostrar más 5 60 6 mil
